case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INS. CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INS. CO. ESTHER JONES BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

ESTHER JONES BAIL BONDS $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,683.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
